name: hacker-bob
description: Portable autonomous bug bounty hunting MCP framework with host adapters

scripts.test:mcp: node --test test/mcp-server.test.js test/bob-export.test.js test/schema-contracts.test.js test/schema-contracts-store.test.js test/contract-divergence.test.js test/doc-delta-runner.test.js test/http-scan-adapter.test.js test/graphql-sdl-parser.test.js test/postman-parser.test.js test/schema-slice-brief.test.js test/auth-differential.test.js test/auth-differential-runner.test.js test/verification-attempt-diff.test.js test/findings-index.test.js test/priors-slice-brief.test.js test/surface-graph.test.js test/surface-graph-builder.test.js
scripts.test:prompts: npm run check:agent-tools && npm run check:skill && node --test test/prompt-contracts.test.js
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:install && npm run test:update && npm run test:cli && npm run test:adapter-detection && npm run test:package && npm run test:policy-replay && npm run test:hooks
